Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gilbert L. Purcell of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Emil Dolner and Francis Dolner

RULING:
DEFENDANT NAVISTAR, INC.'S JOINDER IN MAREMONT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Navistar, Inc.'s joinder in Maremont Corporation's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is denied. Defendant's so-called joinder failed to include a separate statement in violation of C.C.P. 437c(b)(1). Defendant cannot join another party's summary motion. (Frazee v. Seely (2002) 95 Cal.App.4th 627.) Defendant's joinder is also denied as untimely for failing to provide sufficient notice required by C.C.P. 437c(a). Counsel for plaintiffs to prepare an order for the Court's signature and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Tara A. Lohman of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13428 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
